text_block_list.text:
Gold City and I are on our way somewhere, but
she's been holding her head in pain the entire
time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, this is the worst. That medicine isn't working
at all.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. It's just a little headache.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It happens sometimes when I'm modeling.
Yesterday's shoot was especially tough, with all
the harsh lighting.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But hey, it's not the first time this has happened,
so you don't have to worry.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I have another shoot today... I hope the
medicine will start working by then.

Gold City continues to suffer from her headache
for some time.
